canonical_core.requested_outcome: Implement GitHub issue #2074 by adding a command-owned checked-in adoption path for local-only Agentic Workspace installs.

canonical_core.agent_may_decide: Exact command flag naming, structured payload fields, focused test placement, and validation tightening within the lifecycle command boundary.
canonical_core.escalate_when: A better-looking fix changes the requested outcome, owned surface, time horizon, or meaningful validation story.
canonical_core.next_action: Add a scoped upgrade adoption flag, doctor repair action, local-only residue cleanup/reporting, and focused fixture proof.

uv run python scripts/run_agentic_workspace.py doctor --target . --modules planning --format json
completion_criteria: Doctor detects local-only mode and offers a safe checked-in adoption command.
The adoption command removes the local-only sentinel and AW-added .git/info/exclude block, ensures repo local-state ignores, and reports changed/manual-review surfaces.
A fixture covers sentinel, .git/info/exclude, repo .gitignore, and clean follow-up doctor behavior.
